channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: D.C. gears up for Trump's State of the Union
item.description: President Trump is set to give the State of the Union address on Tuesday night amid the partial government shutdown. CBS News' Nancy Cordes and Caitli...

item.title: WATCH: Four years in, Ukrainian soldier reflects on cost of war
item.description: ABC News visits Roman, a firefighter-turned soldier, to see the toll it has taken on him, his family and his country.

item.title: 5 questions heading into Trump’s State of the Union address
Olympic snowboarder Chloe Kim on competing with an injury and her future in the sport
item.description: Olympic snowboarder Chloe Kim, who won a silver medal at the 2026 Winter Games, talks about competing with a shoulder injury, having the support of he...

item.title: WATCH: Meet Punch the monkey
item.description: "GMA" looks at why the internet is obsessed with Punch, the baby monkey who went viral with his plushie.

item.title: Jeff Probst gives inside look at "Survivor's" 50th season and how fans are influencing the show
item.description: Jeff Probst, who has hosted "Survivor" since it first aired more than 25 years ago, talks with "CBS Mornings" about how the 50th season is different, ...

item.title: Northeast US digs out from brutal snowstorm that disrupted flights and canceled school
item.description: Millions across the northeastern United States contended with treks to school and work as they dug out from a major storm that blanketed the region wi...

item.title: What is the highest gold price in history? Here's how it's changed over the past year.
item.description: Gold shattered records in 2025 and kept climbing. Here's what drove the historic rally and where prices stand now.

item.title: Nancy Guthrie's family offering $1 million reward for her whereabouts
item.description: Savannah Guthrie said in a new video that the family is offering an additional reward of up to $1 million for information about their mother Nancy Gut...

item.title: Savannah Guthrie announces new reward for Nancy Guthrie: 'Somebody knows'
item.description: "Today" show host Savannah Guthrie announced on Tuesday a new $1 million reward for the recovery of her mom, Nancy Guthrie, who has been missing since...

item.title: WATCH: The story behind 'Front Porch Freestyles'
item.description: The YouTube hit transforms front porches into stages for emerging artists and music stars alike.

item.title: State of the Union: Trump expected to tout achievements ahead of midterms
item.description: The president will make his case to Americans amid growing controversy over his domestic and foreign policies.

item.title: For Northeast blizzard, everything was just right to roll up a monster snowfall
